code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut current = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut has_digit = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if has_digit
        result = list.push(result, current * sign)
        current = 0
        sign = 1
        has_digit = false
      end
    else if b == 45 and not has_digit
      sign = -1
    else if b == 43 and not has_digit
      sign = 1
    else if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
      has_digit = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has_digit
    result = list.push(result, current * sign)
  end
  result
end

fn get_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match xs.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn max_index(_ xs: List<Int>) -> Int
  mut idx = 0
  mut best = get_at(xs, 0)
  mut i = 1
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    let v = get_at(xs, i)
    if v > best
      best = v
      idx = i
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  idx
end

fn remove_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ idx: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    if i != idx
      result = list.push(result, get_at(xs, i))
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut nums = parse_ints(line1)
let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

let total = nums.len()
let take = if k < total
  k
else
  total
end

mut output = ""
mut i = 0
while i < take
  let mi = max_index(nums)
  let v = get_at(nums, mi)
  if i == 0
    output = "#{v}"
  else
    output = "#{output} #{v}"
  end
  nums = remove_at(nums, mi)
  i = i + 1
end
println(output)
